preReview.title: New York City FC v Seattle Sounders: 'We're ready for whatever the league throws at us', says Ferreira
preReview.description: The Seattle Sounders are already assured of a playoff place, but that does not mean they will take their foot off the gas on Saturday.

preReview.title: New York City FC vs Seattle Sounders: 'Estamos listos para lo que la liga nos lance', dice Ferreira
preReview.description: Los Seattle Sounders ya tienen asegurado un lugar en los playoffs, pero eso no significa que levantarán el pie del acelerador el sábado.

preReview.title: New York City FC contro Seattle Sounders: 'Siamo pronti a qualsiasi sfida ci proponga il campionato', dice Ferreira
preReview.description: I Seattle Sounders sono già certi di un posto nei playoff, ma ciò non significa che sabato rallenteranno il ritmo.

preReview.title: New York City FC x Seattle Sounders: 'Estamos prontos para o que a liga nos reservar', diz Ferreira
preReview.description: O Seattle Sounders já garantiu sua vaga nos playoffs, mas isso não significa que vão tirar o pé do acelerador no sábado.

preReview.title: New York City FC contre Seattle Sounders : 'Nous sommes prêts à tout ce que la ligue nous réserve', déclare Ferreira
preReview.description: Les Seattle Sounders sont déjà assurés d'une place en playoffs, mais cela ne signifie pas qu'ils vont lever le pied samedi.

preReview.title: New York City FC gegen Seattle Sounders: 'Wir sind bereit für alles, was die Liga uns entgegenwirft', sagt Ferreira
preReview.description: Die Seattle Sounders sind bereits für die Playoffs qualifiziert, doch das bedeutet nicht, dass sie am Samstag einen Gang zurückschalten werden.

preReview.title: نيويورك سيتي ضد سياتل ساوندرز: 'نحن جاهزون لأي تحدي من الدوري', يقول فيريرا
preReview.description: فريق سياتل ساوندرز ضمن بالفعل مكانه في التصفيات، لكن هذا لا يعني أنهم سيتوقفون عن الدفع بقوة يوم السبت.

preReview.title: New York City FC x Seattle Sounders: 'Estamos prontos para o que a liga nos jogar', diz Ferreira
preReview.description: O Seattle Sounders já está garantido nos playoffs, mas isso não significa que irão tirar o pé no sábado.

QAData.question: Who won between New York City FC and Seattle Sounders FC on Sat, 18 Oct 2025 22:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Seattle Sounders FC won 2–1 over New York City FC on Sat, 18 Oct 2025 22:00:00 GMT.
